title: rosa moschata var. nivea
intro: Rosa moschata var. nivea, also known as the snow white musk rose, is a variety of the musk rose plant, characterized by its white, fragrant flowers and edible hips. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa moschata var. nivea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the rose hips are typically used to make teas, infusions, and jams, which can be consumed fresh or dried to reap the plant's medicinal and nutritional benefits.
